complete-missions.title: Complete Missions
complete-missions.description: Discover top brands and complete fun tasks to get started on your journey.

earn-tokens.title: Earn Tokens
earn-tokens.description: Collect tokens for every mission and grow your balance effortlessly.

win-rewards.title: Win Rewards
win-rewards.description: Use your tokens to join lotteries and unlock exclusive rewards from top partners.

list.infoBanner: New missions are added every day. Come back tomorrow for more tokens!

anonymous.description: Your data is protected and processed only for statistical purposes.

validationInstant.title: Instant validation
validationInstant.description: Receive your tokens right after the questionnaire ends.
